summary: Completed testing of Phase 3D.3 DataTable rollout for Management portal. Successfully verified DataTable implementation on Inventory (3 tabs), Journal Entries, and Reconciliation pages. Core functionality working with search, filtering, and data display. Minor UI interaction issues found with some filter dropdowns and pagination controls.

ui_bugs.issue: Level filter on Inventory > Items tab not responding to clicks
Type filter on Inventory > Movements tab not responding to clicks
Pagination controls (prev/next buttons) not visible when data count is low
Page size selector (10/20/50) not visible when data count is low

passed_tests: Management > Inventory page loads with KPI cards (Total Items: 47, Stock Value, Low Stock, Movements)
Inventory page displays bar chart for Stock Value by Category
Inventory > Stock tab: DataTable renders with 2 stock records
Inventory > Items tab: DataTable renders with 47 items, search functionality working
Inventory > Movements tab: DataTable renders with movement data
Journal Entries page: DataTable with search functionality working
Journal Entries page: Status filter working (Posted option)
Journal Entries page: Row click opens detail dialog successfully
Reconciliation page: DataTable with search functionality working
Reconciliation page: Status filter working (Matched option)
Reconciliation page: Type filter working (Cash option)
DataTable search functionality working across all three pages
DataTable column headers and data display working correctly
No console errors related to DataTable components

success_percentage.backend: 100% (no backend testing required for frontend-only task)
success_percentage.frontend: 85% (core DataTable functionality working, minor filter interaction issues)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix filter dropdown interactions on Inventory page (Level filter on Items tab, Type filter on Movements tab). Investigate pagination controls visibility when data count is low. Consider improving session management for better user experience.
